title: Iran drone attack on Kuwait International Airport — 1 killed (Indian citizen), 63+ wounded; T1 damaged; IRGC denies, claims US interceptor failure; CENTCOM: 'deliberate, calculated, unjustified'
snippet: Hostile drones hit Terminal 1 at Kuwait International Airport on June 3. One Indian citizen killed, 63+ wounded (7 requiring major surgery). Airport had just reopened Monday after months-long closure. IRGC denies responsibility, claims US interceptor failure caused the damage. CENTCOM responds: 'This was a deliberate, calculated and unjustified attack on civilian infrastructure.' Airport partially reopened at a different terminal.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 이란 드론이 중립국 쿠웨이트의 민간 공항 터미널을 타격. 전쟁 이후 최초의 중립국 민간 인프라 공격. 1명 사망, 63명 부상은 걸프 국가 민간인 대규모 피해의 새로운 차원
